state.next-action: `12-02` now uses `/portal/ops/*` as the canonical staff route family while legacy `/ops/*` paths remain compatibility redirects. `/portal/ops/users` covers role-template assignment, Clerk invite send or reissue, pending-invite revoke, provider resync, and app-owned suspend or restore actions while preserving first-party staff roles and non-active status during Clerk reconciliation. `/portal/ops/customers` now covers set or clear primary customer, send or clear portal access for a linked user, and clear, repair, or true stale-id Stripe resync flows through `/api/internal/ops/customers/[id]`. Continue the phase by deciding whether explicit entitlement locks still need a first-party model beyond role-template and suspension controls; if not, close `12-02` and advance to the provider-adapter/webhook work in `12-03`.
